tasks_pending.summary: Launch hoi3r_stage2_train.py on full subject-01 (100 seqs) × ~4000 steps; budget ~5 h on 8×H100
Delete stream3r/models/ subtree + legacy DCF scripts after verifying no surviving imports. Large blast radius — confirm with user
Port 4RC MotionDecoder weights to our HandMotionHead — requires RoPE + cross-first-block refactor (~200 lines)
Offline renderer side-45° MP4 is only 88 KB — auto-fit synthetic intrinsic to scene extents instead of reusing frame-0 FOV
EXP_COMPARE pristine rot_err 165° suggests coord-frame mismatch between GT extrinsic and Arc.pose_enc; fix before paper-comparable numbers

caveats: Stage 1 hand-L2 mean (~12 mm) is noisy due to random frame sampling; use best-of-last-20 or median-of-last-100, not single-step snapshot.
EXP_COMPARE rot_err numbers are valid for relative ordering only; absolute values suffer from a coord-frame convention mismatch (pristine = 165°).
R3 encoder-cache mode forces e_hand/e_obj + query MLPs frozen; not appropriate for anything beyond Stage 1 overfit validation.
Offline renderer side45 camera reuses the frame-0 FOV — content partially off-frame when scene is wide; camera-view MP4 is the primary deliverable.
The Stage 2 paper-recipe run (pt-so45y00y) used --max-manifest-size=5 and --num-steps=200; full convergence numbers are NOT established yet.
resume_prompt: Read the sidecar at https://haonanhe.github.io/haonanhe/HOI3R-project-tracking/updates/2026-04-22-session-summary-4rc-migration-phase-bh-complete.json and continue from the first pending task.
